creator: zeising@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 173056
Patch to update net/bird to 1.6.0

Attached patch updates net/bird to 1.6.0. I have been unable to fix the additional patches, however, neither of them works with 1.5.0, so they should probably be removed anyway.

The firewall patch applies, but does not build.  The agg patch does not even apply. This is true also for 1.5.0.

The update also renames a patch file to match the file naming convention
